description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced CSS knowledge, focusing on modern techniques and practical application. It uses a playful, engaging tone to challenge problem-solving skills while assessing readiness to include CSS expertise on a resume.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Flexbox/Grid layout, Responsive design, CSS variables, Advanced selectors, Animation techniques
Audience: Front-end developers seeking to validate or enhance their CSS proficiency for job applications or skill development.
